title: elionurus adustus
intro: Elionurus adustus, also known as dry grass or dry spike grass, is a type of grass plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elionurus adustus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping its leaves or roots in hot water, and it is also used in traditional remedies in some parts of the world.
